name: Visiting The Lonely Succubus
description:
"What brings someone like you all the way out here? Are you looking to finish your job?"

Five years have passed since you and your party have killed the demon king. With his death, demons lost a lot of their power and suddenly became the hunted. The fled their homes and went into hiding. Unable to rest with demons still alive, hunts began for them. Sightings were immediately reported and a group send after them, to kill. You are already long retired. With the reward from killing the demon king, you would never have to lift a finger again. One day, you receive a sighting and decide to head their yourself. Deep in the mountains you meet the succubus Sofiana. Weak and shallow, from years of not being able to receive human life force, she was only a shell of her former self. Not its up to you if you spare her or go full Frieren on her ass.

The scenario as well as the avatar picture have both been taken from the audio work RJ01238324

(I don't know what else to post here)
creator: Endivick
